_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Systems design (frontend developer) involves designing systems characterised by high levels of risk and technical complexity; manage and document technical complexity to make sure work is easily maintained and reusable; select the appropriate standards, methods and tools, and make sure they are applied effectively; ensure others follow relevant technical strategies, policies, standards and practices.
reference_document_element_description: Design and build LLM-based application systems, including system prompt design, tool integration, retrieval pipeline, output validation, and failure mode documentation.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-T-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-S-011 (TF, cosine: 0.403), AI-T-013 (AI, cosine: 0.379).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.4/10 (raw 0.540). Shared vocabulary: [design, systems]. DDaT-only terms [applied, appropriate, characterised, complexity, designing, developer] vs WIDAI-only terms [application, based, build, documentation, failure, integration] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.849 (P=0.834, R=0.864). R exceeds P by 0.030 — the WIDAI KSA's 20 words are well-captured by the DDaT element's 54 words, but the DDaT element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:2.0%, N:78.9%, C:19.0%). No dominant classification for "Systems design (frontend developer) involves designing systems characterised by" vs "Design and build LLM-based application systems, including system prompt design," — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.491 ≈ STS 0.540 (gap 0.048). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [design, systems] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.2%. Shared tokens: [design, systems]. DDaT-only: [applied, appropriate, characterised, complexity, designing, developer]. WIDAI-only: [application, based, build, documentation, failure, integration].
